overall.description: Batman traverses a high-rise construction site ledge in Gotham City at night, passing neon signage and overlooking the illuminated skyline with a full moon rising in the background. The footage is from a video game with cinematic third-person perspective.

agents.ego_description: Batman stands on the narrow ledge, facing the large neon construction sign while preparing to traverse the rooftop perimeter.

entered.detail: Large circular neon sign with red and white lettering reading 'CITY VISION CONSTRUCTION'
Tall industrial crane structure silhouetted against the night sky
Metal scaffolding and construction framework surrounding the building edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Batman positioned on a high construction site ledge at night, dominated by the bright neon 'CITY VISION CONSTRUCTION' sign. Industrial scaffolding and cranes frame the right side while the character remains relatively stationary, observing the surroundings before beginning movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction site edge with expanding city view

events.description: City Vision construction sign moves out of frame right as the Heart of Gotham billboard becomes visible

agents.ego_description: Batman walks steadily along the narrow ledge, gripping the metal railing as he moves past industrial equipment and scaffolding.

entered.detail: Large vertical billboard with 'HEART OF GOTHAM' text and blue signage
Metal safety railing running along the ledge edge

segments.scene_description: As Batman moves left along the ledge, the neon construction sign passes behind him and the Heart of Gotham billboard comes into view on the right. The perspective shifts to reveal more of the distant city lights and the industrial crane moves toward the center of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop with panoramic city view

events.description: full moon becomes visible through the clouds, casting pale illumination over the skyline
view opens to reveal the illuminated Gotham bridge and full cityscape under the moonlight

agents.ego_description: Batman continues along the ledge as the view expands to show the distant illuminated bridge and skyscrapers under the full moon.

entered.detail: Large bright full moon partially obscured by clouds in the night sky
Illuminated suspension bridge spanning across the cityscape
Distant cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and city buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the expansive Gotham skyline as the camera pans left, with the full moon emerging through clouds on the left and the illuminated bridge becoming prominent in the center. The Heart of Gotham billboard recedes into the distance on the right as Batman continues his traversal along the high ledge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a high-rise construction ledge that shifts from a close-up industrial setting to an expansive panoramic view of the Gotham skyline. It begins with Batman stationary beside a bright neon City Vision Construction sign, framed by heavy scaffolding and cranes. As he moves left along the ledge, the construction sign recedes and the Heart of Gotham billboard emerges on the right, while the perspective opens to reveal distant city lights. The scene then expands further as the camera pans left, allowing a full moon to break through the clouds and an illuminated bridge to become prominent in the center. Finally, the billboard fades into the distance as the traversal continues, leaving the character dwarfed by the vast, moonlit cityscape.
